message:
🐛 fix: repair leaderboard generation workflow (#1526)

Addresses the root cause of the regression-check false positive that
triggered issue #1523.

Changes:
1. Embed year_start in leaderboard.json output so the regression check
   can detect a scoring-window change across the year boundary. Without
   this, the first scheduled run on January 1st would always fail because
   every contributor's year-to-date score resets to near-zero.

2. Auto-skip the regression check when year_start differs between the
   committed snapshot and the newly generated data, removing the need for
   a manual LEADERBOARD_FORCE=1 override each New Year.

3. Improve the regression-failure error message to give clear actionable
   instructions (point to the workflow_dispatch 'Skip regression check'
   checkbox) rather than the vague 'force=true' hint that was previously
   printed.

4. Backfill year_start into the currently committed leaderboard.json so
   the next scheduled run can immediately compare scoring windows.

Fixes #1523

Signed-off-by: Copilot <copilot@github.com>
Co-authored-by: Copilot <copilot@github.com>
Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
